programs.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programs.desc: The series tells the story of true crimes and their emotional impact on the victims' loved ones long after the crime has been committed.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks 2
programs.desc: Visiting the homes of murderers can give you chills.Conversations with prisoners serving sentences for crimes are a controversial and can be traumatic experience.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programs.desc: Viewers will look into the homes of the killers and meet their families, who often do not suspect anything.Viewers will also see what life is like for perpetrators in prison.

programs.title: Lethally Blonde
programs.desc: True crimes will be presented, for which people chasing fame and beauty are responsible.

programs.title: The Price of Glee
programs.desc: Called a phenomenon and showered with awards, the series "Glee" has forever become a part of the history of American television.Thanks to him, many young actors had an open door to their career.Unfortunately, for some it was the beginning of the end... Today it is known that fate hung over the cast of the show.The first tragedy occurred during the shooting.On July 13, 2013, the star of the production, 31-year-old Cory Monteith, was found dead in a hotel in Vancouver.The cause of death was given as a drug overdose.Then - three years after the last episode of "Glee" aired, in 2018 - the young actor's co-star, Mark Salling, took his own life.In 2020, the media reported the death of another artist associated with the musical, Naya Rivera.The creators of the documentary show the behind-the-scenes life of the cast of the hit, as well as, among others:conversations with Monteith's roommate and Rivera's father.Everyone is looking for an answer to the question: why the success of "Glee" turned out to be both a blessing and a curse.

programs.title: People Magazine Investigates
programs.desc: Crime journalists who are extremely experienced in their field reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.
